title: Add cache system with Redis and memory adapters
description: Implement a caching system with Redis adapter (src/cache/redisAdapter.ts), in-memory adapter with TTL support (src/cache/memoryAdapter.ts), cache manager that selects adapter (src/cache/cacheManager.ts), and cache middleware (src/middleware/cacheMiddleware.ts). Should follow existing middleware patterns from rate-limiter.ts and reuse the existing Cache class from src/utils/cache.ts.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts - factory function pattern for middleware creation
src/utils/cache.ts - existing Cache class with TTL support to potentially reuse
src/utils/result.ts - Result type for explicit error handling
questions: Should the Redis adapter use a specific Redis client library (e.g., ioredis, redis), or is there an existing preference in the codebase?
What should trigger cache invalidation — manual, time-based expiry, or both?
Should the cache middleware operate per-request or per-route (global)?
